exercises.title: The Undo Button
exercises.prompt: Show that ln undoes e^x in BOTH directions — a three-link chain ending at plain x.

exercises.title: The Mirror's Slope
exercises.prompt: The fact you proved with the chain rule: the derivative of ln(x) is 1/x.

exercises.title: Multiplication Becomes Addition
exercises.prompt: The mirror of e^a · e^b = e^(a+b): logs turn products into sums.
